creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
This is FreeBSD 10.0-CURRENT #5 r252055 ia64,
with ports at r322597.

I've phonon installed:

# pkg info -xo phon
phonon-4.6.0_1                 multimedia/phonon
# 

but trying to rebuild it gives:

Linking CXX shared library libphonon.so
/usr/local/lib/libqzeitgeist.so.0.8.0: could not read symbols: File in wrong format
--- phonon/libphonon.so.4.6.0 ---
*** [phonon/libphonon.so.4.6.0] Error code 1

make: stopped in /usr/ports/multimedia/phonon/work/phonon-4.6.0

I've

# pkg info -xo zeit
qzeitgeist-0.8.0               sysutils/qzeitgeist
#
